def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    # sum(close, 100) / 100  ->  average close over 100 periods
    sum_close_100 = rolling_sum(pl.col('close'), window=100)
    avg_close_100 = sum_close_100 / 100

    # delta((sum(close, 100) / 100), 100)
    delta_avg = delta(avg_close_100, periods=100)

    # delay(close, 100)
    delay_close = delay(pl.col('close'), periods=100)

    # Condition: delta_avg / delay_close <= 0.05
    cond = (delta_avg / delay_close) <= 0.05

    # True branch: -1 * (close - ts_min(close, 100))
    true_val = -1 * (pl.col('close') - rolling_min(pl.col('close'), window=100))

    # False branch: -1 * delta(close, 3)
    false_val = -1 * delta(pl.col('close'), periods=3)

    factor = pl.when(cond).then(true_val).otherwise(false_val)

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
